---
title: "About the Authors"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
---


# Charlie Coleman

As of June 2026, I'm between my junior and senior years at <a href = "https.pomona.edu"> Pomona College</a>. I'm pursuing a double major in math and art--I work primarily with Professors Jo Hardin and Michael O'Malley. I grew up and went to school in Wellesley, Massachusetts, and I currently live in San Diego. When I'm not in Estella (Pomona's math building) or at the studio (check out my work <a href = "charliecoleman6.github.io/art_portfolio/"> here </a>), I love to cook, surf, and play guitar. 



# Sebastian Pollack

Hi I'm sebastian and I'm almost a sophomore.
